name: Cream Cheese Flan
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat electric oven to 350°F.
2. In a heavy skillet, heat sugar over medium-low heat, stirring constantly, until caramelized.
3. Quickly pour the caramelized sugar into a deep 10-inch pie plate and tilt to evenly coat the bottom of the plate.
4. In a large bowl of electric mixer, beat cream cheese until smooth.
5. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
6. Add the remaining ingredients; mix well.
7. Pour the mixture over the caramelized sugar.
8. Place the plate in a large baking pan and pour boiling water into the pan to a depth of 1 inch.
9. Bake for 50 to 60 minutes or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
10. Cool and refrigerate overnight.
11. Loosen edges with a knife; invert onto a serving dish.
12. Cut into serving pieces; spoon syrup on each serving.
Makes 8 to 10 servings.
